ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Unique identification number for each student */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the student's record was last updated */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's father */,
  "mother_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's mother */,
  "batch" TEXT /* Batch in which the student is enrolled */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree program the student is pursuing */,
  "present_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., Higher Studies, Employment) */,
  "hs_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the student before this program */,
  "entrance_exam" TEXT /* Entrance examination taken for admission */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute where the student is pursuing their degree */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institute */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's residential address */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average */,
  "total_credits" TEXT /* Total number of credits completed */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* Current semester or year of study */,
  "entrance_exam_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the entrance exam */,
  "entrance_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the entrance exam */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Student's nationality */,
  "previous_institute" TEXT /* Name of the previous educational institution */,
  "previous_degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained from the previous institution */,
  "previous_degree_year" TEXT /* Year of obtaining the previous degree */,
  "status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the current status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the current status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" TEXT /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Foreign key to the students table */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each placement */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Foreign key to the students table */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the student is placed */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position offered to the student */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary offered */,
  "placement_date" TEXT /* Date of placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "higher_studies" (
  "higher_study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each higher study application */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Foreign key to the students table */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university where the student is applying */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Applied, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("higher_study_id")
)
